summary: Frontend-only visual regression for Landing.jsx pastel refresh. Verified DOM order, all 8 topic cards with unique pastel backgrounds (inline rgb values match expected hex exactly), 4 how-it-works cards with badges (1-4) and pastel bg, 4 community cards (2x2) with pastel bg, champions section now on white bg (rgb(255,255,255)) with 5 circular icon avatars, Knowledge Hub teaser with 3 article cards (hub-civic-education / hub-success-story / hub-smart-governance), Champions CTA labelled 'View Leaderboard', and final dark navy CTA card with cta-final-report (saffron) + cta-final-join (white). No 'CITY_HERO_IMAGES' or 'ChampionCategory' JS errors during load. /feed, /map, /submit all load without page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx is 565 lines and densely packed — would benefit from extracting per-section components (HowItWorks, TopicsGrid, CommunityGrid, ChampionsBlock, KnowledgeHub, FinalCTA) into /components/landing/ for maintainability.

Hard-coded English strings exist for Knowledge Hub ('Insights & Stories', 'Learn. Engage. Take Action.', article titles/tags, 'Read More', 'Explore All Categories', 'Learn More', 'View Leaderboard'). For an app that already supports i18n (lang === 'hi'/'te'), these should be moved to i18n keys for parity.
Unused export `ChampionCategory` (line 549-564) — kept 'for future legacy admin views' but currently dead code; safe to remove unless explicitly needed.

Repeated pastel color/bg pair arrays appear in 4 different sections (topics, how-steps, community, champions, knowledge hub). Consider centralising in a constants module e.g. /lib/landingPalette.js to keep colour system consistent.

Two console 401 errors appear on landing (unrelated to this refactor — appears to be an unauthenticated probe of an auth/me-style endpoint). Main agent should surface this as 401-silent rather than logging to console; not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing pastel refresh verified at the DOM/style level. All 8 topic backgrounds, all 4 how-it-works backgrounds, all 4 community backgrounds, the white champions-section computed bg, and all 5 champ-* / 3 hub-* testids are present. CTAs cta-final-report and cta-final-join visible. No CITY_HERO_IMAGES / ChampionCategory errors. Use computed style or rgb() form when asserting pastel backgrounds in playwright — the inline style is serialised as rgb(), not hex.
